text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days earlier, at a scrimmage with Tracen
Academy's most elite...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Daiwa Scarlet grabs an overwhelming victory!
No one could catch up with her after the fourth
corner!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Obviously. I can't be satisfied if I'm not number one in everything...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That means number one in speed, stamina,
competitiveness, and heart! You better be ready,
Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... She's crazy. She's seriously aiming to be
number one in everything.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what kinda training she's been doin', but
it's clearly working.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka! Looks like you didn't run away today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Tell me honestly. What do you think? You want
to win against me so badly it hurts, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I wanna win. You were all talk back in
spring... but you're different now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What the heck happened to push you so far?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You. You're the one who's been pushing me. I'm
not gonna let you leave me behind.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You frustrated me! You opened my eyes! You
made me this serious!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And now, the number one person I want to win
against... is you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I saw your determination when you threw away
everything to enter the Derby, and do you know
what I thought?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to run against you! I didn't wanna lose to
you! I didn't want to be left behind—never again!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to use everything I have to beat you at
your absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been training. I've put in more
effort than anyone else to get here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I dedicated my entire summer for this. That's why
I'm going to be the number one center of
attention this fall!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, is that right? You're not the same Scarlet I
used to know anymore.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Looks like you've found your own answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between them. It looks like the Shuka
Sho is going to be stormy, contrary to the
tranquil autumn weather.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right. Let's see what you got.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You saw my determination at the Derby. Now it's
your turn to show me yours, Scarlet!
